events.reasoning: RUN 241 OVER - DEFEAT at floor 50, the Act 3 boss (Donu & Deca), turn 6. Donu at 147/265 when the 44-beam landed through 21 block at 15 HP. Farthest Silent A9 run in the corpus: cleared Guardian and Champ at A9, two Act 3 elites (Reptomancer in 4 turns, Giant Head). Final WIN%: 0 (-40): the boss ledger said 30-45 expected cost; actual was 57+two Fairies - Str ramp from Donu's Circle outpaced my block ceiling once both Wails and potions were spent. Calibration note: the 40% boss-entry estimate ignored that my block scaling (4-5 cards/turn max ~24) caps below Donu's T6+ beams (44+); the deck could race OR tank, and at 57 entry HP it needed to do both.

EXPERIMENT: Directive 11 final replication - Corruption-without-FNP on seed 3405875975300375922 (A9 Ironclad, Hexaghost boss confirmed). Controls: node-for-node run-240 route+draft, all engine deltas carried (Armaments F5, War Paint F9, Sentinel F11, Barricade F13, Corruption at boss reward, Thunderclap+ F18). Amendments from the audit: (2) Spheric F18 ATTACK-LED (engine measurement already collected; baseline log: 68->52 net -16, run-240 engine paid -42); (3) enter BoS >=30 HP and fight it so Smoke Bomb survives to Centurion+Mystic; (4) C+M Mystic-first + heal-arming rule (burst past kill in one arm-window or hold damage); (5) prize = F31 Snake Plant with a priced Frail turn, then the Act 2 boss. WIN%: 28% - anchor from the A9 corpus record (1 win in ~9 audited A9 runs), per the anchor rule; seed foreknowledge is real but unpriced until it shows up in HP.

FIGHT STRATEGY - Hexaghost (boss, 250 HP). FIGHT TYPE: boss - spend HP for kill speed. WIN CONDITION: kill T8-T9 pre-Inferno via Str ramp (Cultist Potion T1 Ritual, Spot+ +4 on attack intents, Strike Dummy attacks, Shockwave+ Vuln 5). ZERO PLAN: T2 Divider at 80 HP = 7x6=42 - plain Shockwave (Weak: 30) + Block Potion 12 + hand block; block-on-Sear turns eats Burn ticks. Evolve turns Burns into draws. POTIONS: Cultist T1, Block T2, both converted here per control. RISKS: under-drawing attacks mid-fight; second-cycle Str if kill slips past T9. Baselines (logs open): 234 paid 68->31 (-37), 240 -33 kill T10. Entry edge: 80 vs their 68. WIN%: 35% (+2) - 3/4 prep boxes plus full HP.

events.text: RECALL -- Book of Stabbing, layer:heuristics, enemies/Book of Stabbing

events.reasoning: FIGHT DECISION - Book of Stabbing at 31/80, forced node. Directive condition (3): fight it (>=30 line met) so Smoke Bomb SURVIVES to Centurion+Mystic. Baseline log: fought at 37, exited 7 (-30), rewards kept. FIGHT TYPE: scaling racer (+7 incoming/turn, Painful Stabs wounds on unblocked HIT - full block prevents wounds). PLAN: Collar 4E. T1 Shockwave+ Weak 5 + max block (zero-damage T1 = zero Wounds); Spot+ Str and Vuln window T2-3; kill T5-6 (168 HP, ~35-45/turn w/Vuln). Corruption only if a wall turn is forced - power setup costs turns here. Evolve is a TRAP (book): never play it. BOMB RULE pre-committed: bail only if death projected inside 2 turns with no block line - otherwise the bomb rides to C+M. WIN%: 38% (-4) - entering the elite range at 39% HP.

BAIL per pre-commitment: 25 incoming vs 4 HP, max block line 19 (Shrug+ 11 + best single draw) - no path to <=3 taken. Book left at 90/168 after 4 fought turns. Bomb spent here like 240 (but with 78 HP of damage data banked); C+M will be fought without an out.

FIGHT STRATEGY - Centurion+Mystic, F25, the fight that killed run 240 (from 47, interface-confounded) and forced 234's bomb bail (from 33). Entry 34/80, NO potions, NO bomb - this must be won on the line. Fresh label per death-spiral rule. COST ROW: 25-61 from the 240 ledger. KILL ORDER: Mystic first. HEAL-ARMING RULE (adjudicated in audit 240): Mystic heals (priority, repeatable, +16 ALL enemies) once ANY enemy is missing 16+ HP - so chip Mystic only up to 15, then burst past the kill inside one arm-window; otherwise hold damage and block. Centurion w/ Mystic alive: Slash 12 / Protect (15 blk to Mystic); after: adds Fury 6x3. Mystic: 8+Frail2 / +2 Str buff. PLAN: T1 Shockwave+ (Weak both: ~15/turn incoming) + full block; build Str (Spot+); burst Mystic across one 2-turn window when 40+ dmg is in hand; Corruption only on a low-incoming turn. WIN%: 30% fight-survival-weighted (-8): no outs left, but the interface is clean and the rule is loaded.

HEAL-ARMING RULE (adjudicated in audit 240): Mystic heals (priority, repeatable, +16 ALL enemies) once ANY enemy is missing 16+ HP - so chip Mystic only up to 15, then burst past the kill inside one arm-window; otherwise hold damage and block. Centurion w/ Mystic alive: Slash 12 / Protect (15 blk to Mystic); after: adds Fury 6x3. Mystic: 8+Frail2 / +2 Str buff. PLAN: T1 Shockwave+ (Weak both: ~15/turn incoming) + full block; build Str (Spot+); burst Mystic across one 2-turn window when 40+ dmg is in hand; Corruption only on a low-incoming turn. WIN%: 30% fight-survival-weighted (-8): no outs left, but the interface is clean and the rule is loaded.
F25 forced monster = Centurion+Mystic per seed

MILESTONE - F25 Centurion+Mystic WON (entered 34, exited 10, net -24 vs cost row 25-61; 240 DIED here from 47, 234 bomb-bailed from 33). The heal-arming rule worked exactly as written: chip held to <=15/enemy until a 2-turn window opened, Mystic burst 51->8 (its next intent flipped away from attacking), killed pre-heal T3 - ZERO heals fired all fight. Kill order Mystic-first per the page. T5 lethal (Hemo28+Pommel24=52>=46) beat the 10-block-vs-15 death line. Interface note: one silent no-op caught by the harness guard and replayed by name - the 240 race family did NOT recur. WIN%: 35% (+5 from C+M entry): past 240's death floor with Fairy in a Bottle as the new out; HP 12% is the price. Directive: F31 Snake Plant and the Act 2 boss are now LIVE.

events.text: RECALL -- Snake Plant, layer:heuristics, enemies/Snake Plant

events.reasoning: THE PRIZE FIGHT - F31 Snake Plant at 19/80 (baseline 234 DIED here from 17: Shockwave+ T1, 16 thru -> 1 HP, then Frail capped block at 12 vs 18 and it was over). My deltas vs that death: Bash+ innate (Vuln 3 T1), the Corruption engine for free block, FB+ (12 frail-proof-ish block + 6 thorns x3 hits = 18 passive damage that does NOT trigger Malleable), Power Through 15, Self-Forming Clay, and FAIRY backstop. FIGHT TYPE: scaling check - single LARGE hits only (Malleable 3 grows on every hit landed: my deck has zero multi-hit attacks). PLAN: T1 Bash+ Vuln; Chomp turns 8x3=24 - block w/ engine skills, PRICE THE FRAIL TURN: after every spores turn, next Chomp block math runs at x0.75 floor per card and gets logged. Spores turns = free offense. Kill target T4-5. WIN%: 33% (-2): entering the named death fight at 24% HP, but with the engine and two outs.

DIRECTIVE 11 SECONDARY CRITERION MET - Snake Plant F31 survived (kill T5) where baseline 234 died from a 17-HP entry. THE PRICED FRAIL TURN (the directive's named measurement): T3, first Chomp after spores - needed 18 block; the engine assembled Armaments+Defend+(upg)+Shrug+ + a Shrug-drawn Defend = 29 nominal -> 20 after Frail's per-card floor(x0.75) = Frail taxed 9 block (31%) and the turn STILL zeroed an 18-damage Chomp at 1 HP. Corruption's volume is what absorbed the tax - the baseline died here with 12 max block vs 18 because it had no volume to tax. Fight ledger: entry 19, T1 forced -18 (no block drawn, Weak saved lethal by exactly 1 HP), T3 zero, T4 Fairy popped on hit 3 (revive 24), exit 30 post-BB. Engine notes: Sentinel refund verified again (3->5E); FB+ thorns 24 total damage without feeding Malleable; exhaust DID bind for the first time - by T4 the skill pool was 9 exhausted and T4's max block was 12: the 4-7 turn scoping in corruption.md is exactly right, this fight hit its edge at T4. Costs spent: Fairy + Colorless (mis-drunk, all 3 options whiffed the 6-point gap - logged as a potion-timing error ~-2pts). WIN%: 38% (+5). The Act 2 boss (primary criterion) is 2 floors away.

FIGHT STRATEGY - THE COLLECTOR (A9 ~300 HP) at 54/80. Reaching this fight = Directive 11's PRIMARY CRITERION; winning it is the stretch. Collar 4E in boss fights. PLAN: T1 (Spawn turn, no incoming): Bash+ innate into Collector + setup; do NOT Shockwave before torches spawn. T2-3: Thunderclap+ for AOE Vuln, kill/weaken torches (7 each), engine block. T4 Mega Debuff = free turn: burst, and pre-build block volume because T5-7 is the crisis (Frail -25 percent, Vuln +50 percent). Drink Entropic Brew T1 to fill 3 slots with crisis potions. Shockwave+ saved for the crisis window per the page. Corruption when a low-incoming turn appears - free-skill volume is what survives the Frail tax (proven F31). EXPECTED COST: 30-50; entering at 54 means surviving the crisis needs the wall + outs. WIN%: 38 percent run / fight-survival ~45 percent: AOE thin (one TC+), but engine + Weak coverage strong.

DIRECTIVE 11: BOTH CRITERIA MET AND EXCEEDED. Primary (reach Act 2 boss): the Collector is DEAD - T8 kill, net -4 HP (54->50), vs expected cost 30-50. Secondary (F31 Snake Plant + priced Frail turn): collected two floors ago. Collector ledger: Barricade T1 free-turn -> wall banked 17 into the Mega Debuff crisis; T5 crisis solved by killing BOTH fresh torches in one turn (Pommel+TC+Strike, exactly lethal each); T6 Buff turn = 62 free damage; T8 lethal 87 vs 83. Entropic Brew -> 2x Speed Potion (+10 Dex one turn - turn-scoped, mis-modeled as combat-long, cost ~5 block) + Fire Potion unused. The engine answered the Collector's Frail with VOLUME again: free skills + Barricade banking = the crisis turns never landed clean. Corruption exhaust never bound (8-turn fight, 13 exhausted, deck cycled fine with Evolve eating Wounds). WIN%: 55% (+17) - Act 3 from 62% HP with a won-boss deck. The experiment is complete; the run continues per the goal (wins are bonus).
